apps.name: hak ios
apps.localizedDescription: Offline flashcards for Japanese, Korean, and Chinese (Simplified and Traditional). JLPT N5/N4, Korean A1, HSK 3.0 Level 1, TOCFL Novice. Handwriting practice, TTS, backup/restore. No account, no tracking.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used only if you choose to import or export backup files from your photo library.
